Bash(node -e "const f = require\('./src/messages/fr.json'\); const lines = JSON.stringify\(f, null, 2\).split\('\\n'\); console.log\(lines.slice\(-5\).join\('\\n'\)\); console.log\('Total lines:', lines.length\)")

Bash(node -e "const f = require\('./src/messages/en.json'\); const lines = JSON.stringify\(f, null, 2\).split\('\\n'\); console.log\(lines.slice\(-8\).join\('\\n'\)\); console.log\('Keys:', Object.keys\(f\).join\(', '\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const f = require\('./src/messages/en.json'\); const lines = JSON.stringify\(f, null, 2\).split\('\\n'\); const navLines = lines.slice\(0, 20\); console.log\(navLines.join\('\\n'\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const f = require\('./src/messages/th.json'\); const lines = JSON.stringify\(f, null, 2\).split\('\\n'\); console.log\(lines.slice\(0,14\).join\('\\n'\)\); console.log\('---END---'\); console.log\(lines.slice\(-5\).join\('\\n'\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const content=fs.readFileSync\('./src/messages/fr.json','utf8'\); const lines=content.split\('\\n'\); const lastIdx=lines.length-1; console.log\(lines.slice\(lastIdx-3\).join\('\\n'\)\)")

PowerShell(npx playwright test accounts.spec.ts -g "correction de solde" --reporter=list 2>&1 | Out-String)
PowerShell($env:PLAYWRIGHT_PORT = "3100"; npx playwright test accounts.spec.ts -g "correction de solde" --reporter=list 2>&1 | Out-String)
PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { "STILL LISTENING PID: $\($c.OwningProcess\)" } else { "PORT 3000 FREE" })

PowerShell(try { Stop-Process -Id 4048 -Force -ErrorAction Stop; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; "stopped" } catch { "ERR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; $c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { "STILL LISTENING PID: $\($c.OwningProcess\)" } else { "PORT 3000 FREE" })

PowerShell($ok=$false; for \($i=0; $i -lt 40; $i++\) { try { $r=Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:3100/fr/login" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; if \($r.StatusCode -eq 200\) { "LOGIN READY \(try $i\)"; $ok=$true; break } } catch {}; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3 }; if \(-not $ok\) { "NOT READY YET" })
